title: cryptandra wayi
intro: Cryptandra wayi, also known as the swamp cryptandra, is a small shrub native to Western Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian indigenous medicine, and it is known for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments. The health benefits of Cryptandra wayi include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and ease digestive issues. It is often prepared for medicinal use by infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or by using it in a salve or cream to apply topically.
